ops.title: Blocking verbose-comment enforcement in captain-hook (framework + general pack)
ops.description: Overhaul of the verbose-comment rule per approved plan (plan file: we-still-have-claudes-reflective-salamander). Diagnosis: old rule was a max_fires=1 advisory nudge measuring only the introduced delta at 4 lines/300 chars; ccn redirect never existed. Change: ast_grep comment-run machinery (CommentRun, touched_comment_runs post-edit measurement, doc classification, thresholds 3/200), events pre_image/post_image, dispatch warns-survive-a-deny, comments.py rewritten as declarative blocking hook + doc warn + density warn. Ship rides atop 4 unpushed commits incl. un-bumped [9.9.0] CHANGELOG section.

ops.text: dispatch merges warns into a deny message (block-then-warn and warn-then-block tests green)
block/doc-warn/density hooks registered with inline tests green via uvx --isolated capt-hook --hooks captain_hook/packs/general test
full uv run pytest green in captain-hook
released: plugin.json + general pack 0.20.0 bumped, v-tag pushed, PyPI release workflow green
